---
title: "Skill Trends in East Asia"
subtitle: "Insights from Online Job Postings"
date: today
format:
  html:
    theme:
      light: cosmo
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    toc-location: right
    smooth-scroll: true
    code-fold: show
    embed-resources: true
    fig-width: 9
    fig-height: 6
include-in-header:
  text: |
    <style>
      :root {
        --bg-soft: #f8fafc;
        --ink-strong: #0f172a;
        --ink-mid: #334155;
        --card-border: #e2e8f0;
        --brand: #2563eb;
        --brand-2: #0891b2;
        --brand-3: #7c3aed;
      }

      body {
        color: var(--ink-mid);
        background: linear-gradient(180deg, #f8fbff 0%, #ffffff 40%);
        font-feature-settings: "ss01", "cv01";
      }

      #title-block-header {
        margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
      }

      #title-block-header .title {
        font-size: clamp(2.4rem, 4.2vw, 3.35rem);
        line-height: 1.06;
        letter-spacing: -0.03em;
        color: var(--ink-strong);
      }

      #title-block-header .subtitle,
      #title-block-header p.subtitle {
        font-size: clamp(1.25rem, 2vw, 1.55rem);
        line-height: 1.2;
        color: #475569;
        margin-top: 0.45rem;
      }

      .report-eyebrow {
        display: block;
        color: #94a3b8;
        letter-spacing: 0.16em;
        font-weight: 700;
        font-size: 0.76rem;
        text-transform: uppercase;
        margin-bottom: 0.45rem;
      }

      .hero {
        border: 1px solid var(--card-border);
        background: radial-gradient(1200px 280px at 0% 0%, #dbeafe 0%, #f8fafc 55%, #ffffff 100%);
        border-radius: 18px;
        padding: 1.4rem 1.2rem 1rem 1.2rem;
        margin: 0.2rem 0 1.2rem 0;
        box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.06);
      }

      .hero h2 {
        margin-top: 0.2rem;
        margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
        color: var(--ink-strong);
        letter-spacing: -0.01em;
      }

      .hero p {
        margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
        text-align: justify;
      }

      .kpi-grid {
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(150px, 1fr));
        gap: 0.8rem;
        margin: 0.8rem 0 1.4rem 0;
      }

      .kpi-card {
        background: white;
        border: 1px solid var(--card-border);
        border-radius: 14px;
        padding: 0.75rem 0.9rem;
        box-shadow: 0 4px 14px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.05);
      }

      .kpi-label {
        font-size: 0.78rem;
        color: #64748b;
        margin-bottom: 0.2rem;
        text-transform: uppercase;
        letter-spacing: 0.04em;
      }

      .kpi-value {
        color: var(--ink-strong);
        font-weight: 700;
        font-size: 1.3rem;
        line-height: 1.2;
      }

      .section-card {
        background: #fff;
        border: 1px solid var(--card-border);
        border-radius: 16px;
        padding: 1rem 1rem 0.4rem 1rem;
        margin: 0.8rem 0 1rem 0;
        box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.04);
      }

      .table caption {
        caption-side: bottom;
        color: #64748b;
        font-size: 0.85rem;
        padding-top: 0.5rem;
      }

      .table thead th {
        background: #f1f5f9;
        color: #0f172a;
        border-bottom: 1px solid #cbd5e1;
      }

      .table tbody tr:hover {
        background: #f8fafc;
      }

      .market-table th {
        user-select: none;
        cursor: pointer;
        white-space: nowrap;
      }

      .market-table th.active-sort {
        color: var(--ink-strong);
      }

      .market-table td,
      .market-table th {
        vertical-align: middle;
      }

      .market-row-high td {
        background: #f8fbff;
      }

      .market-row-upper_middle td {
        background: #fffdf7;
      }

      .market-row-lower_middle td {
        background: #f7fdfa;
      }

      .market-row-benchmark td {
        background: #fbf9ff;
      }

      .market-table tbody tr:hover td {
        filter: brightness(0.985);
      }

      .source-note {
        margin-top: 0.95rem;
        padding-top: 0.8rem;
        border-top: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
      }

      .source-note-label {
        font-size: 0.78rem;
        font-weight: 700;
        text-transform: uppercase;
        letter-spacing: 0.05em;
        color: #64748b;
        margin-bottom: 0.45rem;
      }

      .source-links {
        display: flex;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
        gap: 0.7rem 1.4rem;
      }

      .source-link {
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: baseline;
        gap: 0.28rem;
        color: #0f6cbd;
        font-weight: 700;
        font-size: 1rem;
        line-height: 1.25;
        text-decoration: none;
        border-bottom: 2px solid rgba(15, 108, 189, 0.28);
        padding-bottom: 0.08rem;
        transition: color 120ms ease, border-color 120ms ease;
      }

      .source-link:hover,
      .source-link:focus {
        color: #0a5aa0;
        border-bottom-color: rgba(10, 90, 160, 0.5);
      }

      .source-link-ext {
        color: #7fb0d8;
        font-size: 0.9em;
      }

      .paper-link {
        position: relative;
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: baseline;
        gap: 0.28rem;
        color: #0f6cbd;
        font-weight: 700;
        line-height: 1.25;
        text-decoration: none;
        border-bottom: 2px solid rgba(15, 108, 189, 0.28);
        padding-bottom: 0.02rem;
        transition: color 120ms ease, border-color 120ms ease;
      }

      .paper-link:hover,
      .paper-link:focus {
        color: #0a5aa0;
        border-bottom-color: rgba(10, 90, 160, 0.5);
      }

      .paper-link:hover,
      .paper-link:focus-visible {
        z-index: 20;
      }

      .paper-cite {
        position: relative;
        display: inline-block;
        color: #0f6cbd;
        font-weight: 700;
        border-bottom: 2px dashed rgba(15, 108, 189, 0.35);
        padding-bottom: 0.02rem;
        cursor: help;
      }

      .paper-cite:hover,
      .paper-cite:focus-visible {
        color: #0a5aa0;
        border-bottom-color: rgba(10, 90, 160, 0.55);
        z-index: 20;
      }

      .paper-cite:focus {
        outline: none;
      }

      .paper-cite:focus-visible {
        outline: 2px solid rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.45);
        outline-offset: 2px;
      }

      .paper-tooltip {
        position: absolute;
        left: 0;
        top: calc(100% + 10px);
        z-index: 100;
        visibility: hidden;
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translateY(-4px);
        transition: opacity 160ms ease, transform 160ms ease, visibility 0s linear 160ms;
        box-sizing: border-box;
        min-width: 14rem;
        max-width: min(26rem, 92vw);
        padding: 0.65rem 0.85rem;
        border-radius: 10px;
        border: 1px solid var(--card-border);
        background: #fff;
        color: var(--ink-mid);
        font-size: 0.8125rem;
        font-weight: 500;
        line-height: 1.5;
        text-align: left;
        text-decoration: none;
        box-shadow: 0 12px 36px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.12), 0 0 0 1px rgba(226, 232, 240, 0.9);
        pointer-events: none;
      }

      .paper-tooltip::before {
        content: "";
        position: absolute;
        left: 1rem;
        top: -6px;
        width: 10px;
        height: 10px;
        background: #fff;
        border-left: 1px solid var(--card-border);
        border-top: 1px solid var(--card-border);
        transform: rotate(45deg);
      }

      .paper-tooltip em {
        font-style: italic;
        color: var(--ink-strong);
      }

      .paper-link:hover .paper-tooltip,
      .paper-link:focus-visible .paper-tooltip,
      .paper-cite:hover .paper-tooltip,
      .paper-cite:focus-visible .paper-tooltip {
        visibility: visible;
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translateY(0);
        transition: opacity 160ms ease, transform 160ms ease, visibility 0s;
      }

      @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
        .paper-tooltip {
          transition: none;
        }
      }

      .modal-link-btn {
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 0.35rem;
        margin-top: 0.7rem;
        padding: 0.5rem 0.85rem;
        border-radius: 999px;
        border: 1px solid #cfe0f3;
        background: #f8fbff;
        color: #0f6cbd;
        font-weight: 700;
        text-decoration: none;
        cursor: pointer;
      }

      .modal-link-btn:hover,
      .modal-link-btn:focus {
        background: #eef6ff;
        color: #0a5aa0;
        border-color: #b8d2ee;
      }

      .pill {
        display: inline-block;
        border-radius: 999px;
        padding: 0.22rem 0.6rem;
        font-size: 0.78rem;
        font-weight: 600;
        margin-right: 0.35rem;
        margin-bottom: 0.35rem;
      }

      .pill-high { background: #dbeafe; color: #1e3a8a; }
      .pill-upper { background: #fef3c7; color: #92400e; }
      .pill-lower { background: #ccfbf1; color: #115e59; }
      .pill-benchmark {
        color: #5b21b6;
        border: 1px solid #c4b5fd;
        background: repeating-linear-gradient(
          -45deg,
          #f5f3ff,
          #f5f3ff 6px,
          #ede9fe 6px,
          #ede9fe 12px
        );
      }

      .map-tooltip {
        position: absolute;
        z-index: 20;
        pointer-events: none;
        opacity: 0;
        min-width: 220px;
        max-width: 280px;
        padding: 0.7rem 0.8rem;
        border-radius: 12px;
        border: 1px solid #dbe3f0;
        background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.97);
        box-shadow: 0 14px 34px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.14);
        backdrop-filter: blur(6px);
      }

      .map-tooltip-title {
        color: var(--ink-strong);
        font-weight: 700;
        font-size: 0.95rem;
        margin-bottom: 0.35rem;
      }

      .map-tooltip-row {
        font-size: 0.82rem;
        color: var(--ink-mid);
        margin: 0.12rem 0;
      }

      .map-tooltip-label {
        color: #64748b;
        font-weight: 600;
      }

      .map-country-active {
        stroke: #0f172a !important;
        stroke-width: 1.2 !important;
        filter: brightness(0.98);
      }

      .map-controls {
        position: absolute;
        top: 12px;
        left: 12px;
        z-index: 15;
        display: flex;
        gap: 0.4rem;
      }

      .map-control-btn {
        border: 1px solid #dbe3f0;
        background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.94);
        color: #0f172a;
        border-radius: 10px;
        min-width: 2.2rem;
        height: 2.2rem;
        padding: 0 0.65rem;
        font-size: 0.95rem;
        font-weight: 700;
        line-height: 1;
        box-shadow: 0 8px 20px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);
        backdrop-filter: blur(6px);
        cursor: pointer;
      }

      .map-control-btn:hover,
      .map-control-btn:focus {
        background: #ffffff;
        border-color: #bfd2ea;
      }

      .pipeline-diagram {
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
        gap: 0.8rem;
        margin: 1.6rem 0 1rem 0;
        padding: 1rem;
        background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f8fafc 0%, #f1f5f9 100%);
        border-radius: 14px;
        border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
      }

      .pipeline-step {
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: center;
        text-align: center;
        justify-content: flex-start;
        min-width: 165px;
        max-width: 185px;
        flex: 1;
        padding: 0.9rem 0.8rem 0.95rem 0.8rem;
        background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.78);
        border: 1px solid rgba(226, 232, 240, 0.95);
        border-radius: 16px;
        box-shadow: 0 10px 24px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.05);
        transition: transform 160ms ease, box-shadow 160ms ease, border-color 160ms ease;
      }

      .pipeline-step:hover,
      .pipeline-step:focus-within {
        transform: translateY(-3px) scale(1.025);
        box-shadow: 0 18px 34px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.10);
        border-color: #cbd5e1;
      }

      .pipeline-step-top {
        width: 100%;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: space-between;
        gap: 0.7rem;
        margin-bottom: 0.7rem;
      }

      .pipeline-step-number {
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        min-width: 2.05rem;
        height: 2.05rem;
        padding: 0 0.45rem;
        border-radius: 999px;
        border: 1px solid #dbe3f0;
        background: #ffffff;
        color: #64748b;
        font-size: 0.73rem;
        font-weight: 800;
        letter-spacing: 0.08em;
        box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.8);
        transition: transform 160ms ease, box-shadow 160ms ease, border-color 160ms ease, color 160ms ease;
      }

      .pipeline-icon {
        width: 60px;
        height: 60px;
        border-radius: 18px;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        margin-bottom: 0.7rem;
        box-shadow: 0 8px 20px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);
        transition: transform 160ms ease, box-shadow 160ms ease, filter 160ms ease;
      }

      .pipeline-step:hover .pipeline-icon,
      .pipeline-step:focus-within .pipeline-icon {
        transform: scale(1.06);
        box-shadow: 0 14px 28px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.12);
        filter: saturate(1.06) brightness(1.02);
      }

      .pipeline-step:hover .pipeline-step-number,
      .pipeline-step:focus-within .pipeline-step-number {
        transform: scale(1.04);
        color: var(--ink-strong);
        border-color: #cbd5e1;
        box-shadow: 0 6px 14px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.9);
      }

      .pipeline-label {
        font-weight: 700;
        font-size: 0.96rem;
        color: var(--ink-strong);
        line-height: 1.22;
        margin-bottom: 0.45rem;
        min-height: 2.35rem;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
      }

      .pipeline-detail {
        font-size: 0.78rem;
        color: #64748b;
        line-height: 1.45;
        padding: 0 0.15rem;
        flex: 1;
        display: flex;
        align-items: flex-start;
      }

      .compare-controls {
        display: flex;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
        gap: 0.8rem;
        margin: 0.3rem 0 1rem 0;
      }

      .compare-control {
        min-width: 100%;
      }

      .compare-control label {
        display: block;
        font-size: 0.78rem;
        font-weight: 700;
        color: #64748b;
        text-transform: uppercase;
        letter-spacing: 0.05em;
        margin-bottom: 0.35rem;
      }

      .country-button-group {
        display: flex;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
        gap: 0.55rem;
      }

      .country-pill {
        border: 1px solid #dbe3f0;
        background: #ffffff;
        color: var(--ink-strong);
        border-radius: 999px;
        padding: 0.5rem 0.8rem;
        font-weight: 700;
        font-size: 0.9rem;
        line-height: 1;
        cursor: pointer;
        transition: background 140ms ease, color 140ms ease, border-color 140ms ease, transform 140ms ease, box-shadow 140ms ease;
        box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.04);
      }

      .country-pill:hover,
      .country-pill:focus {
        transform: translateY(-1px);
        border-color: #bfd2ea;
      }

      .country-pill.active {
        background: #eff6ff;
        border-color: #93c5fd;
        color: #1d4ed8;
        box-shadow: 0 6px 16px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.12);
      }

      .country-pill.disabled {
        background: #f8fafc;
        color: #94a3b8;
        border-color: #e2e8f0;
        cursor: not-allowed;
        box-shadow: none;
      }

      .compare-helper {
        font-size: 0.78rem;
        color: #94a3b8;
      }

      .compare-note {
        font-size: 0.84rem;
        color: #64748b;
        margin: 0.2rem 0 0.9rem 0;
      }

      .compare-charts {
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        gap: 1rem;
      }

      .compare-panel-title {
        font-size: 1.05rem;
        font-weight: 800;
        color: var(--ink-strong);
        margin: 0.2rem 0 0.45rem 0;
      }

      .keyness-meta {
        font-size: 0.84rem;
        color: #64748b;
        margin: 0.15rem 0 0.95rem 0;
      }

      .keyness-table-wrap {
        overflow-x: auto;
      }

      .keyness-table td,
      .keyness-table th {
        white-space: nowrap;
      }

      .keyness-table td:first-child,
      .keyness-table th:first-child {
        white-space: normal;
      }

      .keyness-code {
        color: #94a3b8;
        font-weight: 700;
      }

      @media (max-width: 680px) {
        .pipeline-diagram {
          grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        }
        .pipeline-step {
          max-width: none;
          width: 100%;
        }
        .compare-controls {
          gap: 0.6rem;
        }
      }

      @media (min-width: 681px) and (max-width: 980px) {
        .pipeline-diagram {
          grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
        }
      }

      @media (max-width: 1100px) {
        .kpi-grid {
          grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(140px, 1fr));
        }
      }

      @media (max-width: 720px) {
        .kpi-grid {
          grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(140px, 1fr));
        }
      }

      @media (max-width: 600px) {
        .kpi-grid {
          grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        }
      }
    </style>
    <script>
      document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
        const title = document.querySelector("#title-block-header .title");
        if (!title) return;
        if (document.querySelector(".report-eyebrow")) return;
        const tag = document.createElement("span");
        tag.className = "report-eyebrow";
        tag.textContent = "PROGRESS REPORT";
        title.parentNode.insertBefore(tag, title);
      });
    </script>
---

::: {.hero}
## Executive Summary

This report analyses labour demand in East Asia through
the lens of online job advertisements, with a focus on how employers
signal required skills across occupations and markets. It combines
labour-market analysis with modern NLP methods, including automated
translation, sentence-level classification, and LLM-assisted skill
extraction, to turn unstructured vacancy text into comparable measures
of skill demand.

Using ESCO-based mappings, the report compares the composition of
requested skills and knowledge areas across countries, with special
focus on digital competencies and indicators of relative labour demand
derived from job posting intensity. Labour markets across East Asia are
undergoing
rapid transformation, with increasing digitization reshaping how
employers search for talent. Online job postings (OJPs) provide a useful
proxy for real-time labour demand, particularly for mid- and high-skill
occupations.
:::

```{=html}
<div class="kpi-grid">
  <div class="kpi-card">
    <div class="kpi-label">Job Ads</div>
    <div class="kpi-value">1,953,674</div>
  </div>
  <div class="kpi-card">
    <div class="kpi-label">Markets Analyzed</div>
    <div class="kpi-value">9 <span style="font-size:0.75rem;font-weight:500;color:#64748b;">East Asian</span></div>
    <div style="font-size:0.78rem;color:#94a3b8;margin-top:0.15rem;">+ 4 benchmark</div>
  </div>
  <div class="kpi-card">
    <div class="kpi-label">ESCO Skills</div>
    <div class="kpi-value">13.9K</div>
  </div>
  <div class="kpi-card">
    <div class="kpi-label">Data Period</div>
    <div class="kpi-value" style="font-size:1rem; line-height:1.35;">Mar 2025 — Mar 2026</div>
  </div>
</div>
```

## Regional Coverage

### Countries covered

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
//| output: false

topojson = import("https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/topojson-client@3/+esm")

world = fetch(
  "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/world-atlas@2/countries-110m.json"
).then(r => r.json())

// ISO 3166-1 numeric → label + income group + offer counts
countryMeta = ({
  "392": { name: "Japan",        group: "high",         iso3: "JPN", offers: 258139 },
  "410": { name: "South Korea",  group: "high",         iso3: "KOR", offers: 124869 },
  "158": { name: "Taiwan",       group: "high",         iso3: "TWN", offers: 55217 },
  "702": { name: "Singapore",    group: "high",         iso3: "SGP", offers: 138202 },
  "764": { name: "Thailand",     group: "upper_middle", iso3: "THA", offers: 57892 },
  "360": { name: "Indonesia",    group: "upper_middle", iso3: "IDN", offers: 113460 },
  "458": { name: "Malaysia",     group: "upper_middle", iso3: "MYS", offers: 171586 },
  "704": { name: "Vietnam",      group: "lower_middle", iso3: "VNM", offers: 145549 },
  "608": { name: "Philippines",  group: "lower_middle", iso3: "PHL", offers: 187818 },
  "356": { name: "India",        group: "benchmark",    iso3: "IND", offers: 224187 },
})

benchmarkMeta = ([
  { name: "Chile", group: "benchmark", iso3: "CHL", offers: 142324 },
  { name: "Mexico", group: "benchmark", iso3: "MEX", offers: 199404 },
  { name: "Poland", group: "benchmark", iso3: "POL", offers: 135027 },
])

mapBenchmarkMetaById = ({
  "152": { name: "Chile",  group: "benchmark", iso3: "CHL", offers: 142324 },
  "484": { name: "Mexico", group: "benchmark", iso3: "MEX", offers: 199404 },
  "616": { name: "Poland", group: "benchmark", iso3: "POL", offers: 135027 },
})

allMarketMeta = [
  ...Object.values(countryMeta),
  ...benchmarkMeta,
]

palette = ({
  high:         "#1d4ed8",
  upper_middle: "#f59e0b",
  lower_middle: "#0d9488",
  benchmark:    "#7c3aed",
  bg:        "#f1f5f9",
  border:    "#ffffff",
  ocean:     "#eff6ff",
  land:      "#e2e8f0",
})

// Label anchor positions [lon, lat] with nudge
labelAnchors = [
  { id: "392", lon: 140,  lat: 37,   dx: 8,  dy: 0   },
  { id: "410", lon: 128,  lat: 36,   dx: -45,dy: 12  },
  { id: "158", lon: 121,  lat: 23.5, dx: 8,  dy: 8   },
  { id: "764", lon: 101,  lat: 14,   dx: -10,dy: 16  },
  { id: "704", lon: 107,  lat: 16,   dx: 10, dy: 0   },
  { id: "458", lon: 109,  lat: 3,    dx: -50,dy: -8  },
  { id: "608", lon: 122,  lat: 12,   dx: 10, dy: 0   },
  { id: "702", lon: 104,  lat: 1.3,  dx: -55,dy: 8   },
  { id: "360", lon: 118,  lat: -2,   dx: 0,  dy: 14  },
  { id: "356", lon: 79,   lat: 22,   dx: -10,dy: 0   },
  { id: "152", lon: -71,  lat: -30,  dx: 10, dy: 0   },
  { id: "484", lon: -102, lat: 23,   dx: 10, dy: 0   },
  { id: "616", lon: 19,   lat: 52,   dx: 8,  dy: 0   },
]

laborForceOverrides = ({
  TWN: { year: 2025, value: 12028000 },
})

laborForceByIso3 = Object.fromEntries(await Promise.all(
  [...new Set(allMarketMeta.map(d => d.iso3))].map(async iso3 => {
    if (laborForceOverrides[iso3]) {
      return [iso3, laborForceOverrides[iso3]]
    }
    const url = `https://api.worldbank.org/v2/country/${iso3}/indicator/SL.TLF.TOTL.IN?format=json&per_page=3`
    const data = await fetch(url).then(r => r.json())
    const row = (data?.[1] || []).find(d => d.value != null)
    return [iso3, row ? { year: Number(row.date), value: Number(row.value) } : null]
  })
))

gdpGrowthOverrides = ({
  TWN: { year: 2025, value: 8.63 },
})

gdpGrowthByIso3 = Object.fromEntries(await Promise.all(
  [...new Set(allMarketMeta.map(d => d.iso3))].map(async iso3 => {
    if (gdpGrowthOverrides[iso3]) {
      return [iso3, gdpGrowthOverrides[iso3]]
    }
    const url = `https://api.worldbank.org/v2/country/${iso3}/indicator/NY.GDP.MKTP.KD.ZG?format=json&per_page=3`
    const data = await fetch(url).then(r => r.json())
    const row = (data?.[1] || []).find(d => d.value != null)
    return [iso3, row ? { year: Number(row.date), value: Number(row.value) } : null]
  })
))

fmtInt = d3.format(",")
fmtRate = d3.format(".1f")

groupLabels = ({
  high: "High-income",
  upper_middle: "Upper-middle-income",
  lower_middle: "Lower-middle-income",
  benchmark: "Benchmark",
})

metricsFor = (meta) => {
  const lf = laborForceByIso3[meta.iso3]
  const gdp = gdpGrowthByIso3[meta.iso3]
  return {
    ...meta,
    income_group: groupLabels[meta.group],
    labor_force: lf?.value ?? null,
    labor_force_year: lf?.year ?? null,
    real_gdp_growth_2025: gdp?.value ?? null,
    real_gdp_growth_year: gdp?.year ?? null,
    offers_per_100k: (meta.offers != null && lf?.value)
      ? (meta.offers / lf.value) * 100000
      : null,
  }
}

countryRowsById = Object.fromEntries(
  Object.entries(countryMeta).map(([id, meta]) => [id, metricsFor(meta)])
)

mapRowsById = Object.fromEntries(
  [...Object.entries(countryMeta), ...Object.entries(mapBenchmarkMetaById)]
    .map(([id, meta]) => [id, metricsFor(meta)])
)

benchmarkRows = benchmarkMeta.map(metricsFor)

groupOrder = ({ high: 0, upper_middle: 1, lower_middle: 2, benchmark: 3 })

reportRows = [...Object.values(countryRowsById), ...benchmarkRows]
  .sort((a, b) => groupOrder[a.group] - groupOrder[b.group] || b.offers - a.offers)

tooltipHtml = (row) => {
  const offersText = row.offers == null ? "n/a" : fmtInt(row.offers)
  const lfText = row.labor_force == null ? "n/a" : fmtInt(row.labor_force)
  const per100k = row.offers_per_100k == null ? "n/a" : fmtRate(row.offers_per_100k)
  const gdpText = row.real_gdp_growth_2025 == null ? "n/a" : fmtRate(row.real_gdp_growth_2025)
  const lfYear = row.labor_force_year ? ` (${row.labor_force_year})` : ""
  return `
    <div class="map-tooltip-title">${row.name}</div>
    <div class="map-tooltip-row"><span class="map-tooltip-label">Income group:</span> ${row.income_group}</div>
    <div class="map-tooltip-row"><span class="map-tooltip-label">Job offers:</span> ${offersText}</div>
    <div class="map-tooltip-row"><span class="map-tooltip-label">Labor force${lfYear}:</span> ${lfText}</div>
    <div class="map-tooltip-row"><span class="map-tooltip-label">Offers per 100k LF:</span> ${per100k}</div>
    <div class="map-tooltip-row"><span class="map-tooltip-label">Real GDP growth (2025):</span> ${gdpText}%</div>
  `
}
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
//| fig-cap: "Analyzed countries grouped by income status."

{
  const W = 860, H = 560;
  const container = d3.create("div")
    .style("position", "relative")
    .style("max-width", "100%")
    .style("overflow", "hidden");

  const tooltip = container.append("div")
    .attr("class", "map-tooltip");

  const controls = container.append("div")
    .attr("class", "map-controls");

  const projection = d3.geoMercator()
    .center([108, 18])
    .scale(480)
    .translate([W / 2, H / 2]);

  const path = d3.geoPath(projection);

  const land = topojson.feature(world, world.objects.countries);

  const svg = container.append("svg")
    .attr("viewBox", [0, 0, W, H])
    .attr("width", W)
    .attr("height", H)
    .style("max-width", "100%")
    .style("height", "auto")
    .style("font-family", "system-ui, sans-serif");

  // Ocean and subtle background grid feel
  svg.append("rect")
    .attr("width", W).attr("height", H)
    .attr("fill", palette.ocean);

  const mapLayer = svg.append("g");

  // Stripe pattern for benchmark country (India)
  const defs = svg.append("defs");
  const hatch = defs.append("pattern")
    .attr("id", "benchmarkHatch")
    .attr("patternUnits", "userSpaceOnUse")
    .attr("width", 8)
    .attr("height", 8)
    .attr("patternTransform", "rotate(45)");

  hatch.append("rect")
    .attr("width", 8)
    .attr("height", 8)
    .attr("fill", "#f5f3ff");

  hatch.append("line")
    .attr("x1", 0).attr("y1", 0)
    .attr("x2", 0).attr("y2", 8)
    .attr("stroke", palette.benchmark)
    .attr("stroke-width", 2);

  const showTooltip = (event, row) => {
    const [x, y] = d3.pointer(event, container.node());
    const rect = container.node().getBoundingClientRect();
    const tooltipWidth = 250;
    const tooltipHeight = 120;
    const left = Math.min(rect.width - tooltipWidth - 12, Math.max(12, x + 14));
    const top = Math.min(rect.height - tooltipHeight - 12, Math.max(12, y + 14));
    tooltip
      .html(tooltipHtml(row))
      .style("left", `${left}px`)
      .style("top", `${top}px`)
      .style("opacity", 1);
  };

  const hideTooltip = () => {
    tooltip.style("opacity", 0);
  };

  const zoom = d3.zoom()
    .scaleExtent([0.15, 6])
    .on("zoom", (event) => {
      mapLayer.attr("transform", event.transform);
    });

  svg.call(zoom);

  controls.append("button")
    .attr("class", "map-control-btn")
    .attr("type", "button")
    .attr("title", "Zoom in")
    .text("+")
    .on("click", () => {
      svg.transition().duration(220).call(zoom.scaleBy, 1.35);
    });

  controls.append("button")
    .attr("class", "map-control-btn")
    .attr("type", "button")
    .attr("title", "Zoom out")
    .text("−")
    .on("click", () => {
      svg.transition().duration(220).call(zoom.scaleBy, 1 / 1.35);
    });

  controls.append("button")
    .attr("class", "map-control-btn")
    .attr("type", "button")
    .attr("title", "Reset view")
    .style("min-width", "auto")
    .text("Reset")
    .on("click", () => {
      svg.transition().duration(260).call(zoom.transform, d3.zoomIdentity);
    });

  // Countries
  const countryPaths = mapLayer.selectAll("path.country")
    .data(land.features)
    .join("path")
      .attr("class", "country")
      .attr("d", path)
      .attr("fill", d => {
        const m = mapRowsById[d.id];
        if (!m) return palette.land;
        return m.group === "benchmark" ? "url(#benchmarkHatch)" : palette[m.group];
      })
      .attr("stroke", palette.border)
      .attr("stroke-width", 0.5)
      .attr("opacity", d => mapRowsById[d.id] ? 1 : 0.6)
      .style("cursor", d => mapRowsById[d.id] ? "pointer" : "default");

  countryPaths
    .filter(d => mapRowsById[d.id])
    .on("mouseenter", function(event, d) {
      d3.select(this).classed("map-country-active", true);
      showTooltip(event, mapRowsById[d.id]);
    })
    .on("mousemove", function(event, d) {
      showTooltip(event, mapRowsById[d.id]);
    })
    .on("mouseleave", function() {
      d3.select(this).classed("map-country-active", false);
      hideTooltip();
    });

  // Small-country markers (Singapore is invisible at 110m)
  for (const anc of labelAnchors) {
    if (anc.id === "702") {
      const [cx, cy] = projection([anc.lon, anc.lat]);
      const m = mapRowsById[anc.id];
      mapLayer.append("circle")
        .attr("cx", cx).attr("cy", cy).attr("r", 4)
        .attr("fill", m.group === "benchmark" ? palette.benchmark : palette[m.group])
        .attr("stroke", palette.border)
        .attr("stroke-width", 1)
        .style("cursor", "pointer")
        .on("mouseenter", (event) => showTooltip(event, m))
        .on("mousemove", (event) => showTooltip(event, m))
        .on("mouseleave", hideTooltip);
    }
  }

  // Labels
  const labels = mapLayer.append("g").attr("class", "labels");

  for (const anc of labelAnchors) {
    const [x, y] = projection([anc.lon, anc.lat]);
    const m = mapRowsById[anc.id];
    if (!m) continue;

    labels.append("text")
      .attr("x", x + (anc.dx || 0))
      .attr("y", y + (anc.dy || 0))
      .attr("text-anchor", "start")
      .attr("font-size", "11px")
      .attr("font-weight", 600)
      .attr("fill", "#1e293b")
      .attr("paint-order", "stroke")
      .attr("stroke", "#ffffffcc")
      .attr("stroke-width", 3)
      .text(m.name);
  }

  // Legend
  const lg = svg.append("g")
    .attr("transform", `translate(20, ${H - 106})`);

  const items = [
    { label: "High-income economies", color: palette.high, hatch: false },
    { label: "Upper-middle-income economies", color: palette.upper_middle, hatch: false },
    { label: "Lower-middle-income economies", color: palette.lower_middle, hatch: false },
    { label: "Benchmark", color: palette.benchmark, hatch: true },
  ];

  items.forEach(({ label, color, hatch }, i) => {
    const marker = lg.append("rect")
      .attr("x", 0).attr("y", i * 22)
      .attr("width", 14).attr("height", 14)
      .attr("rx", 2)
      .attr("fill", color);
    if (hatch) {
      marker
        .attr("fill", "url(#benchmarkHatch)")
        .attr("stroke", color)
        .attr("stroke-width", 1);
    }
    lg.append("text")
      .attr("x", 20).attr("y", i * 22 + 12)
      .attr("font-size", "12px")
      .attr("fill", "#334155")
      .text(label);
  });

  return container.node();
}
```

<span class="pill pill-lower">Lower-middle-income: Vietnam, Philippines</span>
<span class="pill pill-upper">Upper-middle-income: Thailand, Indonesia, Malaysia</span>
<span class="pill pill-high">High-income: Japan, South Korea, Singapore, Taiwan</span>
<span class="pill pill-benchmark">Benchmark: India, Chile, Mexico, Poland</span>

::: {.section-card}
### Relative labour demand

The table below summarizes the absolute number of job offers and the number of
offers per 100,000 people in the labor force. This allows us to compare
both the scale of observed hiring and its intensity relative to each
country's labour supply. Click a column header to sort the table.

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

{
  const rows = reportRows.map(d => ({
    country: d.name,
    group: d.group,
    income_group: d.income_group,
    offers: d.offers,
    offers_per_100k: d.offers_per_100k,
    real_gdp_growth_2025: d.real_gdp_growth_2025,
  }));

  const table = d3.create("table")
    .attr("class", "table table-sm align-middle market-table");

  const columns = [
    { key: "country", label: "Country", type: "text" },
    { key: "income_group", label: "Income group", type: "text" },
    { key: "offers", label: "Job offers", type: "number" },
    { key: "offers_per_100k", label: "Offers per 100k labor force", type: "number" },
    { key: "real_gdp_growth_2025", label: "Real GDP growth (2025)", type: "number" },
  ];

  let sortKey = "income_group";
  let sortDirection = "asc";

  const thead = table.append("thead");
  const headerRow = thead.append("tr");
  const tbody = table.append("tbody");

  const sortRows = () => {
    const sorted = [...rows].sort((a, b) => {
      if (sortKey === "income_group") {
        const cmp = groupOrder[a.group] - groupOrder[b.group];
        if (cmp !== 0) return sortDirection === "asc" ? cmp : -cmp;
        return b.offers - a.offers;
      }
      const av = a[sortKey];
      const bv = b[sortKey];
      if (av == null && bv == null) return 0;
      if (av == null) return 1;
      if (bv == null) return -1;
      const cmp = columns.find(c => c.key === sortKey).type === "text"
        ? String(av).localeCompare(String(bv))
        : av - bv;
      return sortDirection === "asc" ? cmp : -cmp;
    });
    return sorted;
  };

  const renderBody = () => {
    tbody.selectAll("tr").remove();
    sortRows().forEach(row => {
      const tr = tbody.append("tr")
        .attr("class", `market-row-${row.group}`);
      tr.append("td").text(row.country);
      tr.append("td").text(row.income_group);
      tr.append("td").style("text-align", "right").text(fmtInt(row.offers));
      tr.append("td")
        .style("text-align", "right")
        .text(row.offers_per_100k == null ? "n/a" : fmtRate(row.offers_per_100k));
      tr.append("td")
        .style("text-align", "right")
        .text(row.real_gdp_growth_2025 == null ? "n/a" : `${fmtRate(row.real_gdp_growth_2025)}%`);
    });
  };

  columns.forEach(col => {
    headerRow.append("th")
      .attr("class", col.key === sortKey ? "active-sort" : null)
      .text(`${col.label}${col.key === sortKey ? (sortDirection === "asc" ? " ↑" : " ↓") : ""}`)
      .on("click", function() {
        if (sortKey === col.key) {
          sortDirection = sortDirection === "asc" ? "desc" : "asc";
        } else {
          sortKey = col.key;
          sortDirection = col.type === "text" ? "asc" : "desc";
        }
        headerRow.selectAll("th")
          .attr("class", d => null)
          .text((d, i) => {
            const c = columns[i];
            return `${c.label}${c.key === sortKey ? (sortDirection === "asc" ? " ↑" : " ↓") : ""}`;
          });
        headerRow.selectAll("th")
          .filter((d, i) => columns[i].key === sortKey)
          .attr("class", "active-sort");
        renderBody();
      });
  });

  renderBody();

  return table.node();
}
```
:::

```{=html}
<div class="source-note">
  <div class="source-note-label">Macroeconomic sources</div>
  <div class="source-links">
    <a class="source-link" href="https://data.worldbank.org/indicator/SL.TLF.TOTL.IN" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">
      World Bank labor force (2025)
      <span class="source-link-ext">↗</span>
    </a>
    <a class="source-link" href="https://data.worldbank.org/indicator/NY.GDP.MKTP.KD.ZG" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">
      World Bank real GDP growth (2025)
      <span class="source-link-ext">↗</span>
    </a>
    <a class="source-link" href="https://eng.stat.gov.tw/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">
      National Statistics, Republic of China (Taiwan, 2025)
      <span class="source-link-ext">↗</span>
    </a>
  </div>
</div>
```

## Data and Methodology

::: {.section-card}
### Data collection

We collect job advertisements from **Indeed** and **Careerjet**, two large
aggregators with country-specific sites across the markets covered in this
study. The analytical sample shown here comprises roughly **1.95 million**
postings covering March 2025 – March 2026.

```{=html}
<button type="button" class="modal-link-btn" data-bs-toggle="modal" data-bs-target="#dataCollectionModal">
  Read more
  <span aria-hidden="true">↗</span>
</button>

<div class="modal fade" id="dataCollectionModal" tabindex="-1" aria-labelledby="dataCollectionModalLabel" aria-hidden="true">
  <div class="modal-dialog modal-lg modal-dialog-scrollable">
    <div class="modal-content">
      <div class="modal-header">
        <h5 class="modal-title" id="dataCollectionModalLabel">Data collection details</h5>
        <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="modal" aria-label="Close"></button>
      </div>
      <div class="modal-body">
        <p>We use two aggregators: <strong>Indeed</strong>, the most established platform in the sample, and <strong>Careerjet</strong>, a newer but growing platform. We selected them because both provide dedicated country-level sites across the markets included in the analysis.</p>
        <p>For all country-platform combinations, we developed Python web scrapers that retrieve job postings and extract core information such as job title, job description, company name, salary, job and company location, posting date, contract type, remote-work status, industry, company size and revenue, and the original job-post URL.</p>
        <p>Because attribute availability varies across postings, we restrict the analytical sample to offers containing at least a job title, a job description, and the original URL. We additionally remove duplicates with identical titles and descriptions, both within each job board and across boards.</p>
        <p>Both portals impose practical result limits for broad queries. Indeed typically exposes up to 1,000 postings and Careerjet up to 2,000. To improve coverage, we run multiple searches by region within each country and monitor cases where the maximum visible result count is returned, since that suggests that additional postings may be omitted.</p>
        <p>The scraping pipeline runs daily on a cloud-hosted Python environment. Automated tests alert us to blocking or portal-structure changes, allowing quick maintenance when needed. Retrieved postings are stored in an SQL database that supports efficient querying at scale.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

:::

::: {.section-card}
### Processing pipeline

Raw job postings arrive in different languages and contain noisy,
unstructured information. We transform them into a standardised analytic
dataset in six steps: we first identify the posting language, translate
non-English text into a common language, isolate skill-relevant
sentences, map extracted skills to ESCO, standardise job titles to ESCO
occupations using both titles and skill context for disambiguation, and
then enrich each posting with sector information by assigning NACE
economic activity codes.

```{=html}
<div class="pipeline-diagram">
  <div class="pipeline-step">
    <div class="pipeline-step-top">
      <div class="pipeline-step-number">01</div>
      <div class="pipeline-icon" style="background:#e0f2fe;color:#0369a1;">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="30" height="30" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.9" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M6 4h9a3 3 0 0 1 3 3v6a3 3 0 0 1-3 3H9l-4 4v-4H6a3 3 0 0 1-3-3V7a3 3 0 0 1 3-3z"/><path d="M8 9h5"/><path d="M8 12h3"/></svg>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="pipeline-label">Language<br>Detection</div>
    <div class="pipeline-detail">ML-based identification of the source language for each job posting</div>
  </div>
  <div class="pipeline-step">
    <div class="pipeline-step-top">
      <div class="pipeline-step-number">02</div>
      <div class="pipeline-icon" style="background:#fef3c7;color:#b45309;">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="30" height="30" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.9" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M5 8h6"/><path d="M8 6v2c0 2.1-1 4.2-2.8 5.6"/><path d="M6 12c.8 1.2 2 2.2 3.4 2.8"/><path d="m13 7 6 10"/><path d="m19 7-6 10"/></svg>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="pipeline-label">Translation</div>
    <div class="pipeline-detail">Fine-tuned Gemma-architecture model translates non-English descriptions to English</div>
  </div>
  <div class="pipeline-step">
    <div class="pipeline-step-top">
      <div class="pipeline-step-number">03</div>
      <div class="pipeline-icon" style="background:#ccfbf1;color:#0d9488;">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="30" height="30" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.9" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M4 6h16"/><path d="M7 12h10"/><path d="M10 18h4"/><circle cx="6.5" cy="6.5" r="1"/><circle cx="17.5" cy="12.5" r="1"/><circle cx="8.5" cy="18.5" r="1"/></svg>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="pipeline-label">Skill-Sentence<br>Filtering</div>
    <div class="pipeline-detail">Fine-tuned BERT-architecture classifier identifies skill-relevant sentences</div>
  </div>
  <div class="pipeline-step">
    <div class="pipeline-step-top">
      <div class="pipeline-step-number">04</div>
      <div class="pipeline-icon" style="background:#ede9fe;color:#7c3aed;">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="30" height="30" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.9" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="7"/><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="3"/><path d="M12 2v3"/><path d="M12 19v3"/><path d="M2 12h3"/><path d="M19 12h3"/></svg>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="pipeline-label">ESCO<br>Mapping</div>
    <div class="pipeline-detail">Contrastive bi-encoder matches extracted skills to ~14,000 ESCO taxonomy entries</div>
  </div>
  <div class="pipeline-step">
    <div class="pipeline-step-top">
      <div class="pipeline-step-number">05</div>
      <div class="pipeline-icon" style="background:#dbeafe;color:#1d4ed8;">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="30" height="30" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.9" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M7 4h10"/><path d="M9 8h6"/><path d="M12 8v9"/><path d="M8 20h8"/><path d="M5 12c1.2-1.4 2.8-2 4.7-2"/><path d="M19 12c-1.2-1.4-2.8-2-4.7-2"/></svg>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="pipeline-label">Job Title<br>Standardisation</div>
    <div class="pipeline-detail">Job titles are mapped to ESCO occupations using titles and extracted skills as context for disambiguation</div>
  </div>
  <div class="pipeline-step">
    <div class="pipeline-step-top">
      <div class="pipeline-step-number">06</div>
      <div class="pipeline-icon" style="background:#dcfce7;color:#15803d;">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="30" height="30" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.9" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M4 7h16"/><path d="M4 12h10"/><path d="M4 17h7"/><path d="M17 11c2.2 0 4 1.8 4 4s-1.8 4-4 4-4-1.8-4-4"/><path d="m17 13 1.4 1.4L21 12"/></svg>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="pipeline-label">Data<br>Augmentation</div>
    <div class="pipeline-detail">NACE economic activity is assigned using the official ESCO-NACE crosswalk and job-ad context for disambiguation</div>
  </div>
</div>
```

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
Our pipeline outperforms the current state of the art by approximately
3 percentage points in RP@5 on the HOUSE and TECH benchmark datasets
reported by <a class="paper-link" href="https://arxiv.org/html/2505.24640v1" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Decorte et al. (2025)<span class="source-link-ext">↗</span><span class="paper-tooltip" role="tooltip">Decorte, J.-J., Van Hautte, J., Develder, C., &amp; Demeester, T. (2025). <em>Efficient Text Encoders for Labor Market Analysis.</em> <em>IEEE Access</em>, 13, 133596&#8211;133608.</span></a>. These benchmarks consist of job
postings annotated with ESCO gold-standard skill labels by human
experts, against which model predictions are evaluated. The reported
RP@5 scores are 0.822 and 0.838, respectively.
:::

:::


## Results

::: {.section-card}
### Skills per offer

The table below summarises how many ESCO-mapped skills are retained per
job posting. To show the distribution, it reports the mean together
with selected percentiles. Click a column header to sort the table.

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

{
  const rows = [
    { country: "India", mean: 13.68, p10: 2.0, p25: 5.0, median: 12.0, p75: 20.0, p90: 28.0 },
    { country: "Japan", mean: 10.17, p10: 2.0, p25: 5.0, median: 9.0, p75: 14.0, p90: 19.0 },
    { country: "South Korea", mean: 6.09, p10: 0.0, p25: 1.0, median: 3.0, p75: 8.0, p90: 16.0 },
    { country: "Malaysia", mean: 13.82, p10: 1.0, p25: 5.0, median: 12.0, p75: 20.0, p90: 29.0 },
    { country: "Mexico", mean: 10.70, p10: 2.0, p25: 5.0, median: 9.0, p75: 15.0, p90: 21.0 },
    { country: "Philippines", mean: 14.70, p10: 3.0, p25: 7.0, median: 13.0, p75: 20.0, p90: 29.0 },
    { country: "Poland", mean: 17.96, p10: 7.0, p25: 12.0, median: 17.0, p75: 24.0, p90: 30.0 },
    { country: "Singapore", mean: 16.93, p10: 5.0, p25: 10.0, median: 16.0, p75: 23.0, p90: 31.0 },
    { country: "Thailand", mean: 10.35, p10: 1.0, p25: 1.0, median: 7.0, p75: 16.0, p90: 26.0 },
    { country: "Taiwan", mean: 14.73, p10: 1.0, p25: 5.0, median: 12.0, p75: 22.0, p90: 32.0 },
    { country: "Vietnam", mean: 18.07, p10: 7.0, p25: 11.0, median: 17.0, p75: 23.0, p90: 31.0 },
    { country: "Overall", mean: 13.22, p10: 2.0, p25: 5.0, median: 12.0, p75: 19.0, p90: 27.0, overall: true },
  ];

  const table = d3.create("table")
    .attr("class", "table table-sm align-middle market-table");

  const columns = [
    { key: "country", label: "Country", align: "left", type: "text" },
    { key: "mean", label: "Mean", align: "right", type: "number" },
    { key: "p10", label: "P10", align: "right", type: "number" },
    { key: "p25", label: "P25", align: "right", type: "number" },
    { key: "median", label: "Median", align: "right", type: "number" },
    { key: "p75", label: "P75", align: "right", type: "number" },
    { key: "p90", label: "P90", align: "right", type: "number" },
  ];

  let sortKey = "mean";
  let sortDirection = "desc";

  const thead = table.append("thead");
  const header = thead.append("tr");
  const tbody = table.append("tbody");

  const sortRows = () => {
    const baseRows = rows.filter(d => !d.overall);
    const overall = rows.find(d => d.overall);
    const sorted = [...baseRows].sort((a, b) => {
      const av = a[sortKey];
      const bv = b[sortKey];
      const cmp = columns.find(c => c.key === sortKey).type === "text"
        ? String(av).localeCompare(String(bv))
        : av - bv;
      return sortDirection === "asc" ? cmp : -cmp;
    });
    return overall ? [...sorted, overall] : sorted;
  };

  const renderBody = () => {
    tbody.selectAll("tr").remove();
    sortRows().forEach(row => {
      const tr = tbody.append("tr")
        .style("font-weight", row.overall ? "700" : null)
        .style("background", row.overall ? "#f8fafc" : null);
      tr.append("td").text(row.country);
      tr.append("td").style("text-align", "right").style("font-variant-numeric", "tabular-nums").text(fmtRate(row.mean));
      tr.append("td").style("text-align", "right").style("font-variant-numeric", "tabular-nums").text(fmtRate(row.p10));
      tr.append("td").style("text-align", "right").style("font-variant-numeric", "tabular-nums").text(fmtRate(row.p25));
      tr.append("td").style("text-align", "right").style("font-variant-numeric", "tabular-nums").text(fmtRate(row.median));
      tr.append("td").style("text-align", "right").style("font-variant-numeric", "tabular-nums").text(fmtRate(row.p75));
      tr.append("td").style("text-align", "right").style("font-variant-numeric", "tabular-nums").text(fmtRate(row.p90));
    });
  };

  columns.forEach(col => header.append("th")
    .attr("class", col.key === sortKey ? "active-sort" : null)
    .style("text-align", col.align)
    .style("font-variant-numeric", col.align === "right" ? "tabular-nums" : null)
    .text(`${col.label}${col.key === sortKey ? (sortDirection === "asc" ? " ↑" : " ↓") : ""}`)
    .on("click", function() {
      if (sortKey === col.key) {
        sortDirection = sortDirection === "asc" ? "desc" : "asc";
      } else {
        sortKey = col.key;
        sortDirection = col.type === "text" ? "asc" : "desc";
      }
      header.selectAll("th")
        .attr("class", null)
        .text((d, i) => {
          const c = columns[i];
          return `${c.label}${c.key === sortKey ? (sortDirection === "asc" ? " ↑" : " ↓") : ""}`;
        });
      header.selectAll("th")
        .filter((d, i) => columns[i].key === sortKey)
        .attr("class", "active-sort");
      renderBody();
    }));

  renderBody();

  return table.node();
}
```
:::

::: {.section-card}
### Cross-country comparison

The charts below compare the composition of mapped ESCO concepts across
three selected countries. Shares are normalised within each country
separately for **skills** and **knowledge**, so each column sums to 100%
within the respective panel. The knowledge panel shows the most frequent
3-digit knowledge categories. Language and other ESCO concept types are
excluded from this specific view.

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

categoryData = FileAttachment("esco_category_shares.json").json()

{
  const data = await categoryData;
  const countries = data.country_order;
  const countryButtons = [
    { key: "India", label: "India", enabled: true },
    { key: "Japan", label: "Japan", enabled: true },
    { key: "South Korea", label: "South Korea", enabled: true },
    { key: "Malaysia", label: "Malaysia", enabled: true },
    { key: "Philippines", label: "Philippines", enabled: true },
    { key: "Singapore", label: "Singapore", enabled: true },
    { key: "Thailand", label: "Thailand", enabled: true },
    { key: "Taiwan", label: "Taiwan", enabled: true },
    { key: "Vietnam", label: "Vietnam", enabled: true },
    { key: "Mexico", label: "Mexico", enabled: true },
    { key: "Poland", label: "Poland", enabled: true },
    { key: "Indonesia", label: "Indonesia", enabled: false },
    { key: "Chile", label: "Chile", enabled: false },
  ];
  let selectedCountries = ["Japan", "Singapore", "Vietnam", "India", "Poland"];
  const skillCodes = ["S1", "S2", "S3", "S4", "S5", "S6", "S7", "S8"];

  const wrap = d3.create("div");

  const controls = wrap.append("div").attr("class", "compare-controls");
  const box = controls.append("div").attr("class", "compare-control");
  box.append("label").text("Select up to 5 countries");
  const buttonGroup = box.append("div").attr("class", "country-button-group");

  wrap.append("div")
    .attr("class", "compare-note")
    .text("Each cell shows the share of the selected country in the most aggregated ESCO skill and knowledge groups. You can compare up to five countries at once.");

  const chartHost = wrap.append("div").attr("class", "compare-charts");

  const shortLabel = (text, n = 44) => {
    if (text === "information and communication technologies (icts)") return "ICT";
    return text.length > n ? `${text.slice(0, n - 1)}…` : text;
  };

  function drawHeatmap({rows, selected, paletteInterpolator}) {
    const margin = {top: 20, right: 14, bottom: 10, left: 270};
    const cellW = 92;
    const cellH = 30;
    const width = margin.left + selected.length * cellW + margin.right;
    const height = margin.top + rows.length * cellH + margin.bottom;
    const maxShare = d3.max(rows.flatMap(r => selected.map(c => r.values[c] || 0))) || 0.001;
    const color = d3.scaleSequential([0, maxShare], paletteInterpolator);

    const svg = d3.create("svg")
      .attr("viewBox", [0, 0, width, height])
      .attr("width", width)
      .attr("height", height)
      .style("max-width", "100%")
      .style("height", "auto");

    selected.forEach((country, i) => {
      svg.append("text")
        .attr("x", margin.left + i * cellW + cellW / 2)
        .attr("y", margin.top - 12)
        .attr("text-anchor", "middle")
        .attr("font-size", 12)
        .attr("font-weight", 700)
        .attr("fill", "#334155")
        .text(country);
    });

    rows.forEach((row, r) => {
      const y = margin.top + r * cellH;

      const rowLabel = svg.append("text")
        .attr("x", margin.left - 10)
        .attr("y", y + cellH / 2 + 4)
        .attr("text-anchor", "end")
        .attr("font-size", 12);

      rowLabel.append("tspan")
        .attr("fill", "#94a3b8")
        .attr("font-weight", 600)
        .text(`${row.code} `);

      rowLabel.append("tspan")
        .attr("fill", "#334155")
        .attr("font-weight", 700)
        .attr("text-decoration", "underline")
        .text(row.label);

      selected.forEach((country, c) => {
        const value = row.values[country] || 0;
        const x = margin.left + c * cellW;
        svg.append("rect")
          .attr("x", x)
          .attr("y", y)
          .attr("width", cellW - 4)
          .attr("height", cellH - 4)
          .attr("rx", 6)
          .attr("fill", color(value))
          .attr("stroke", "#ffffff");
        svg.append("text")
          .attr("x", x + (cellW - 4) / 2)
          .attr("y", y + cellH / 2 + 4)
          .attr("text-anchor", "middle")
          .attr("font-size", 11)
          .attr("font-weight", 700)
          .attr("fill", value > maxShare * 0.45 ? "#ffffff" : "#0f172a")
          .text(d3.format(".1%")(value));
      });
    });

    return svg.node();
  }

  function render() {
    const selected = selectedCountries;
    chartHost.selectAll("*").remove();

    const skillRows = skillCodes.map(code => ({
      code,
      label: shortLabel(data.skill_meta[code] || code, 38),
      values: Object.fromEntries(selected.map(country => [country, data.countries[country]?.skill_shares?.[code] || 0]))
    }));

    const knowledgeRows = [...data.top_knowledge_codes]
      .map(code => ({
        code,
        label: shortLabel(data.knowledge_meta[code] || code, 42),
        values: Object.fromEntries(selected.map(country => [country, data.countries[country]?.knowledge_shares?.[code] || 0]))
      }))
      .sort((a, b) =>
        d3.mean(selected.map(country => b.values[country] || 0)) -
        d3.mean(selected.map(country => a.values[country] || 0))
      );

    const skillPanel = chartHost.append("div");
    skillPanel.append("div")
      .attr("class", "compare-panel-title")
      .text("Skills");
    skillPanel.append(() => drawHeatmap({
      rows: skillRows,
      selected,
      paletteInterpolator: t => d3.interpolateRgb("#eff6ff", "#2563eb")(t)
    }));

    const knowledgePanel = chartHost.append("div");
    knowledgePanel.append("div")
      .attr("class", "compare-panel-title")
      .text("Knowledge");
    knowledgePanel.append(() => drawHeatmap({
      rows: knowledgeRows,
      selected,
      paletteInterpolator: t => d3.interpolateRgb("#fff7ed", "#ea580c")(t)
    }));
  }

  const buttons = buttonGroup.selectAll("button")
    .data(countryButtons)
    .join("button")
      .attr("type", "button")
      .attr("class", d => `country-pill${d.enabled ? "" : " disabled"}${selectedCountries.includes(d.key) ? " active" : ""}`)
      .property("disabled", d => !d.enabled)
      .text(d => d.label)
      .on("click", function(event, d) {
        if (!d.enabled) return;
        const isSelected = selectedCountries.includes(d.key);
        if (isSelected) {
          if (selectedCountries.length === 1) return;
          selectedCountries = selectedCountries.filter(v => v !== d.key);
        } else {
          if (selectedCountries.length >= 5) return;
          selectedCountries = [...selectedCountries, d.key];
        }
        buttons.attr("class", btn => `country-pill${btn.enabled ? "" : " disabled"}${selectedCountries.includes(btn.key) ? " active" : ""}`);
        render();
      });

  render();

  return wrap.node();
}
```
:::

::: {.section-card}
### Digital skills prevalence

Using the digital skill classification from
<a class="paper-link" href="https://ideas.repec.org/p/wbk/hdgens/203091.html" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Angel-Urdinola et al. (2025)<span class="source-link-ext">↗</span><span class="paper-tooltip" role="tooltip">Angel-Urdinola, D., Chinen, M. H., &amp; Rodon Casarramona, G. (2025). <em>Digital Skills Development: Competence Frameworks, Assessment Tools, and Pedagogical Approaches.</em> <em>Education Notes</em>, (203091).</span></a>, we
identify ESCO skills associated with **basic**, **intermediate**, and
**advanced** digital capabilities. In broad terms, **basic** digital
skills cover routine use of standard software and digital tools,
**intermediate** skills include working with specialised business or ICT
applications, and **advanced** skills refer to tasks such as software
development, data science, AI, or advanced systems engineering. The
chart below shows the composition of identified digital skill mentions
within each country, so the three segments sum to 100% for every bar.

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

digitalData = FileAttachment("digital_skill_offer_shares.json").json()

{
  const data = await digitalData;
  const levelOrder = ["Basic", "Intermediate", "Advanced"];
  const palette = {
    Basic: "#93c5fd",
    Intermediate: "#3b82f6",
    Advanced: "#1d4ed8"
  };

  const rows = [...data.rows]
    .map(d => ({
      country: d.country,
      Basic: d.shares.Basic,
      Intermediate: d.shares.Intermediate,
      Advanced: d.shares.Advanced
    }))
    .sort((a, b) => b.Advanced - a.Advanced);

  const margin = {top: 34, right: 24, bottom: 28, left: 150};
  const rowH = 30;
  const width = 860;
  const height = margin.top + rows.length * rowH + margin.bottom;

  const svg = d3.create("svg")
    .attr("viewBox", [0, 0, width, height])
    .attr("width", width)
    .attr("height", height)
    .style("max-width", "100%")
    .style("height", "auto");

  const x = d3.scaleLinear()
    .domain([0, 1])
    .range([margin.left, width - margin.right]);

  const legend = svg.append("g")
    .attr("transform", `translate(${margin.left}, 14)`);

  levelOrder.forEach((level, i) => {
    const g = legend.append("g").attr("transform", `translate(${i * 160}, 0)`);
    g.append("rect")
      .attr("width", 14)
      .attr("height", 14)
      .attr("rx", 3)
      .attr("fill", palette[level]);
    g.append("text")
      .attr("x", 20)
      .attr("y", 11)
      .attr("font-size", 12)
      .attr("font-weight", 700)
      .attr("fill", "#334155")
      .text(level);
  });

  rows.forEach((row, i) => {
    const y0 = margin.top + i * rowH;

    svg.append("text")
      .attr("x", margin.left - 12)
      .attr("y", y0 + 17)
      .attr("text-anchor", "end")
      .attr("font-size", 12)
      .attr("font-weight", 700)
      .attr("fill", "#334155")
      .text(row.country);

    let x0 = margin.left;
    levelOrder.forEach((level, j) => {
      const value = row[level];
      const w = x(value) - x(0);
      svg.append("rect")
        .attr("x", x0)
        .attr("y", y0 + 5)
        .attr("width", w)
        .attr("height", 20)
        .attr("rx", 6)
        .attr("fill", palette[level]);

      if (w > 54) {
        svg.append("text")
          .attr("x", x0 + w / 2)
          .attr("y", y0 + 19)
          .attr("text-anchor", "middle")
          .attr("font-size", 11)
          .attr("font-weight", 700)
          .attr("fill", j === 0 ? "#1e3a8a" : "#ffffff")
          .text(d3.format(".1%")(value));
      }
      x0 += w;
    });
  });

  return svg.node();
}
```
:::


:::: {.section-card}
### Country-specific digital skills and knowledge

To identify digital skills and knowledge that are particularly
characteristic of individual countries, we apply the log-likelihood
ratio (`G²`) test following <span class="paper-cite" tabindex="0">Dunning (1993)<span class="paper-tooltip" role="tooltip">Dunning, T. (1993). <em>Accurate Methods for the Statistics of Surprise and Coincidence.</em> <em>Computational Linguistics</em>, 19(1), 61&#8211;74.</span></span>, a method widely used in
corpus-based analysis to compare term distributions across text
collections. Here, the same logic is applied to extracted ESCO concepts:
the test assesses whether specific digital skills or digital knowledge
items occur in a given country’s job postings in a systematically
different way than would be expected based on their distribution in the
other analysed countries.

For this section, **digital skills** are defined as ESCO concepts in the
`S5` branch (`working with computers`), while **digital knowledge** is
defined as ESCO’s ICT knowledge branch (`06*`). Higher `G²` values
indicate concepts that are more distinctive for the selected country
relative to the rest of the sample.

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

digitalKeyness = FileAttachment("digital_keyness.json").json()

{
  const data = await digitalKeyness;
  const countryOrder = [
    "Japan",
    "South Korea",
    "Singapore",
    "Taiwan",
    "Malaysia",
    "Thailand",
    "Vietnam",
    "Philippines",
    "India",
    "Mexico",
    "Poland"
  ].filter(country => data.countries[country]);

  let selectedCountry = countryOrder[0];

  const wrap = d3.create("div");
  const controls = wrap.append("div").attr("class", "compare-controls");
  const control = controls.append("div").attr("class", "compare-control");
  control.append("label").text("Select country");
  const buttonGroup = control.append("div").attr("class", "country-button-group");
  wrap.append("div")
    .attr("class", "compare-note")
    .text("Tables are ranked by G². Only concepts with at least 3 mentions in the selected country and 10 mentions in the pooled sample are shown.");

  const meta = wrap.append("div").attr("class", "keyness-meta");
  const charts = wrap.append("div").attr("class", "compare-charts");

  function renderTable(title, rows) {
    const panel = charts.append("div");
    panel.append("div")
      .attr("class", "compare-panel-title")
      .text(title);

    const tableWrap = panel.append("div").attr("class", "keyness-table-wrap");
    const table = tableWrap.append("table").attr("class", "table table-sm keyness-table");
    const thead = table.append("thead").append("tr");
    ["Concept", "Mentions", "Per 1k", "Rest of sample", "G²"].forEach(label => {
      thead.append("th").text(label);
    });

    const tbody = table.append("tbody");
    rows.forEach(row => {
      const tr = tbody.append("tr");
      const concept = tr.append("td");
      concept.append("div")
        .attr("style", "font-weight:700;color:#0f172a;")
        .text(row.label);
      concept.append("div")
        .attr("class", "keyness-code")
        .text(row.code);
      tr.append("td").text(d3.format(",")(row.country_count));
      tr.append("td").text(d3.format(".1f")(row.country_rate * 1000));
      tr.append("td").text(d3.format(".1f")(row.other_rate * 1000));
      tr.append("td").text(d3.format(".1f")(row.g2));
    });

    if (!rows.length) {
      const tr = tbody.append("tr");
      tr.append("td")
        .attr("colspan", 5)
        .attr("style", "color:#64748b;")
        .text("No concepts meet the display threshold for this country.");
    }
  }

  function render() {
    const countryMeta = data.countries[selectedCountry];
    meta.text(
      `Selected country: ${selectedCountry}. Based on ${d3.format(",")(countryMeta.digital_skill_mentions)} digital skill mentions and ${d3.format(",")(countryMeta.digital_knowledge_mentions)} digital knowledge mentions.`
    );

    charts.selectAll("*").remove();
    renderTable("Digital knowledge", data.knowledge[selectedCountry] || []);
    renderTable("Digital skills", data.skills[selectedCountry] || []);
  }

  const buttons = buttonGroup.selectAll("button")
    .data(countryOrder)
    .join("button")
      .attr("type", "button")
      .attr("class", country => `country-pill${country === selectedCountry ? " active" : ""}`)
      .text(country => country)
      .on("click", function(event, country) {
        selectedCountry = country;
        buttons.attr("class", value => `country-pill${value === selectedCountry ? " active" : ""}`);
        render();
      });

  render();
  return wrap.node();
}
```
::::


## References

::: {#refs}
Decorte, J.-J., Van Hautte, J., Develder, C., & Demeester, T. (2025).
Efficient Text Encoders for Labor Market Analysis.
*IEEE Access*, 13, 133596–133608.

Angel-Urdinola, D., Chinen, M. H., & Rodon Casarramona, G. (2025).
Digital Skills Development: Competence Frameworks, Assessment Tools, and Pedagogical Approaches.
*Education Notes*, (203091).

Dunning, T. (1993).
Accurate Methods for the Statistics of Surprise and Coincidence.
*Computational Linguistics*, 19(1), 61-74.
:::
